incident_narrative: While parking, the vehicle was struck by an adjacent car door, leaving a noticeable dent on the front left door panel.

policy.insurer: Bharat Suraksha Motor Insurance Co. Ltd
policy.product: Motor Private Car Comprehensive (Own Damage + Third Party Liability)
policy.description: Comprehensive cover with all damage types indemnified under one accidental-external-means clause. Standard age-based depreciation (Nil to 50%); glass at nil depreciation; fibre-glass parts at 30%. No add-on covers.

coverage.text: [SECTION I. LOSS OF OR DAMAGE TO THE VEHICLE INSURED] (cid:127) By accidental external means, including collision, impact with another vehicle or stationary object, and resulting dents, scratches, cracks, and breakage of lamps or other exterior fittings.
coverage.heading: SECTION I. LOSS OF OR DAMAGE TO THE VEHICLE INSURED

coverage.text: [SECTION V. ADD-ON COVERS] Add-On 3: Engine Protection Cover Consequential damage to engine parts and gearbox components arising from water ingression due to flood or inundation is covered under this add-on, subject to the claim under Section I being admissible and the vehicle being
coverage.heading: SECTION V. ADD-ON COVERS

coverage.text: SECTION I. LOSS OF OR DAMAGE TO THE VEHICLE INSURED The Company will indemnify the insured against loss or damage to the vehicle insured and its accessories whilst thereon, arising from the following perils: (cid:127) By fire, explosion, self-ignition, or lightning.
coverage.heading: SECTION I. LOSS OF OR DAMAGE TO THE VEHICLE INSURED

coverage.text: [SECTION V. ADD-ON COVERS] retrieved from the waterlogged area within 72 hours. Exclusion under Engine Protection: Damage to engine or gearbox arising from delay in intimation, from driving the vehicle after it has ingested water, or from gradual corrosion of engine parts, is not covered.
coverage.heading: SECTION V. ADD-ON COVERS

exclusion_or_condition.text: [SECTION VII. GENERAL CONDITIONS] 5. The due observance of all terms, conditions, and endorsements of this policy is a condition precedent to any liability of the Company.
exclusion_or_condition.heading: SECTION VII. GENERAL CONDITIONS

exclusion_or_condition.text: SECTION III. DEDUCTIBLE The Company shall not be liable for the first Rs. 1,000 of each and every claim under Section I of this policy. This deductible applies to each occurrence independently, including occurrences giving rise to a Total Loss or Constructive Total Loss claim.
exclusion_or_condition.heading: SECTION III. DEDUCTIBLE
